# security policy

## supported versions

| version | supported |
|---------|-----------|
| main    | yes       |

## reporting a vulnerability

please do **not** open public issues for security concerns.

instead, email [i@egleba.ru](mailto:i@egleba.ru) with details. include:

- description of the issue
- steps to reproduce
- potential impact
- suggested fix (if any)

expect an initial response within 7 days.
